title: Immersive Portals Continued
description: I fork of immersive portals to work with iris forge, connector mod, and sodium 0.6
body:
Fixes multiple bugs and crashes with immersive portals with connector, iris, and sodium (works with embeddium and oculus too :D )

compat with complementary shaders with euphoria patches :D


original description \/
Allows seeing through portals and directly walk into the portal without loading screen. Portals can "fold" space and create uneuclidian geometry with rotation and scale transformations.

Also has mirrors, dimension stack, world wrapping, scale box wrapping, commands for customizing portals, datapack functionality for customizing portals. See the wiki for more details.

Wiki: https://qouteall.fun/immptl/wiki
